# LegislatorTerm

Each row is one term of service. A legislator may have many terms across both chambers.

**GraphQL type:** `LegislatorTerm` · **Connection:** `LegislatorTermsConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allLegislatorTerms(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `LegislatorTermsConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `legislatorTermById(id: BigInt!)` | `LegislatorTerm` | Look up by primary key |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `id` | `BigInt` |  <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `bioguideId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `termType` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span>. One of: `rep`, `sen` |
| `startDate` | `Date` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `endDate` | `Date` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `state` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `party` | `String` |  |
| `caucus` | `String` |  |
| `district` | `Int` | House only. 0 = at-large district. -1 = unknown in historical data. |
| `senateClass` | `Int` | One of: `1`, `2`, `3` |
| `stateRank` | `String` | One of: `junior`, `senior` |
| `how` | `String` |  |

## Relationships

### Belongs to

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `legislatorByBioguideId` | `Legislator` | `bioguideId` |

## Example

```graphql
{
  allLegislatorTerms(
    filter: { state: { equalTo: "TX" }, termType: { equalTo: "sen" } }
    orderBy: START_DATE_DESC
    first: 10
  ) {
    nodes {
      startDate
      endDate
      party
      state
      legislatorByBioguideId {
        officialFull
      }
    }
  }
}
```
